name: Oriental BBQ Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the toasted sesame seeds, peanut butter, brown sugar, curry powder, soy sauce, pepper, oil, sherry, grated ginger, and minced garlic in a blender.
2. Blend for 45 seconds until smooth.
3. Stir the blended mixture into a bowl with the chopped green onions.
4. Use this marinade to marinate chicken.
